description:
A modern and secure instant messaging for people, business and healthcare


[Fixed] Chat Window: "Close all windows" option not working in close dialog
[Fixed] Chat Window: Adjusted error red color to improve contrast
[Fixed] Chat Window: Initials within chat may not match algorithm used elsewhere
[Fixed] Contact List: Improved performance for large contact lists with many channels
[Fixed] Contact List: Offline contact initials now use a darker color
[Fixed] Media: Fixed issue where GIF browser could consume excessive memory during multiple searches
[Fixed] Reactions: Tooltips now show both names when only two reactions are present
